K2 & Lendor Burton Elephant Charge 2016

1 October 2016 · 📍 Chongwe River

Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Conservation Grants

Funds distributed to conservation organisations from the 2016 charge.

Organisation Amount (ZMW) Purpose
Chipembele Wildlife Education Trust 33,000 Support the Conservation Education Outreach Programme which runs conservation clubs in 17 schools each week. The funds also supports a mobile education unit vehicle which is used for conservation education in remote communities in the Mambwe District.
Chipembele Wildlife Education Trust 33,000 Covering costs of logistics and materials for on site conservation education program
Conservation Lake Tanganyika 113,000 Put towards building a Community School on the senstive eastern park boundary
Conservation Lower Zambezi 47,050 Environmental Education Programme support
Conservation South Luangwa 47,050 Annual Conservation Fun Run & Sports Day, anti-snaring/patrols
Game Rangers International 47,050 Towards community conservation education, including popular local radio programs
Kasanka Trust 113,000 Building of a new office at Wasa Lodge HQ & capital equipment
Wildlife & Environmental Conservation Society of Zambia 187,897 Support 1,001 Chongololo clubs and 40,040 members
Zambian Carnivore Programme 33,000 Supporting Conservation Biologist Training, Conservation Clubs, de-snaring of carnivores
Total 632,047
Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
